title: Grilled Bao with Smoky Courgettes
description: A sweet and savory Asian-inspired dish featuring grilled courgettes and delicate bao buns.
instructions: 1. Preheat your grill to medium-high heat.
2. Slice the courgettes into 1/2-inch thick rounds.
3. Brush the courgettes with sesame oil and season with smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper.
4. Grill the courgettes for 3-4 minutes per side, or until tender and lightly charred.
5. Meanwhile, toast the bao buns by grilling them for 2-3 minutes, or until lightly browned.
6. In a small bowl, whisk together soy sauce and honey.
7. Assemble the bao buns by spreading a small amount of the soy sauce-honey mixture on the bottom bun, followed by a grilled courgette round, and finishing with the top bun.
8. Garnish with chopped green onions and serve immediately.
